hero.headline: Your AI-Powered Intelligence Briefing, Every Morning
hero.subheadline: Stay ahead of the curve. NeuralBrief scans hundreds of sources overnight and delivers a crisp, personalized digest on AI, tech, and your competitors — straight to your inbox by 7 AM.
hero.successMessage: You're on the list! Check your inbox for a confirmation.
hero.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

features.title: Built for People Who Can't Afford to Miss a Thing
features.subtitle: Four intelligent agents work through the night so you wake up informed, not overwhelmed.
features.desc1: Our Scraper Agent monitors hundreds of trusted tech and industry sources in real time, capturing the stories that matter before your competitors do.
features.desc2: The Filter Agent scores every article for relevance and deduplicates overlapping coverage, so your digest contains only signal — never noise.
features.desc3: The Summary Agent distills each story into two to three clear sentences using Gemini AI, giving you the key insight without the click.
features.desc4: The Email Agent assembles a beautifully formatted digest and delivers it to your Gmail every morning at 7 AM, personalized to your chosen topics.

footer.tagline: Stay sharp. Stay ahead. Every morning.

bookmarks.title: Saved Articles
bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet. Save articles from your digest to find them here.
bookmarks.loginRequired: Sign in to view and manage your bookmarks.

engine.title: How the Intelligence Pipeline Works
engine.description: Four specialized AI agents run every night in sequence, transforming raw web data into your personalized morning briefing.
engine.step1Desc: Crawls hundreds of curated tech news sources, RSS feeds, and company blogs. Extracts article titles, snippets, URLs, and metadata for every topic you follow.
engine.step2Desc: Uses Gemini AI to score each article for relevance against your selected topics, removes duplicates, and discards low-quality or off-topic content.
engine.step3Desc: Generates concise two-to-three sentence summaries for every filtered article, categorizing each as breaking news, analysis, a product release, or general coverage.
engine.step4Desc: Compiles all summarized items into a clean, structured digest grouped by topic and delivers it to your Gmail inbox via the Gmail API every morning at 7 AM UTC.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: We track hundreds of curated sources including TechCrunch, The Verge, Wired, MIT Technology Review, official company engineering blogs, ArXiv AI preprints, and more. You can also suggest sources via your profile.
faq.q2: Can I choose what topics appear in my digest?
faq.a2: Yes. During onboarding and at any time in your profile, you can select from dozens of topics such as Artificial Intelligence, Cybersecurity, SaaS, Cloud Infrastructure, Startups, and Competitor Tracking.
faq.q3: What time will my digest arrive?
faq.a3: Digests are generated and dispatched at 07:00 UTC daily. Depending on your timezone and email provider, you should receive it within a few minutes of that time.
faq.a4: We use Google OAuth2 for authentication and the Gmail API only to send you emails. We never store your Gmail password and we never read your inbox.
faq.q5: Can I pause or stop my digest?
faq.a5: Absolutely. You can switch your digest frequency to Weekly or None at any time from your profile preferences. Changes take effect the next day.

cta.title: Start Your Morning Smarter
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of founders, engineers, and analysts who never miss an important development in their industry.
